initiatives.notes: Sprint +1 delivery plan for Incident Hub v1, Runbook Center v1, Tenant Console v1, and metering v0 (governed extension).

Captured Kore.ai guardrails/PII masking, HITL autonomy modes, and audit bundle subsumption master plan; naming ladder set to Assist→Copilot→Autonomous pending UX taxonomy audit; execpolicy amendment deferred pending governance countersign.

Sprint +6 plan covering pilot execution, activation funnel, feedback capture, migration tools, and v1.1 roadmap lock.

Switchboard consumer-to-enterprise wedge: positioning, policy modes, receipts/replay, skill trust ladder, white-label admin, and threat model docs.
